traits.name: Adrenaline
traits.description: When you enter critical health (below 25 HP), you will receive a small Stamina boost (restores 50 Stamina).

traits.name: Ambidextrous
traits.description: Quicker reloading of matched pairs (25% faster), and custom clip reloads for semi-auto pistol sets (25% faster).

weapon_synergies.reason: Speeds up custom clip reloads for semi-auto pistols, reducing downtime in firefights.
Faster matched pair reloads for revolvers, allowing quicker follow-up shots.
Quicker reloads for semi-auto shotguns, keeping pressure on enemies.
Speeds up custom clip reloads for semi-auto pistols, crucial in close combat.
Faster matched pair reloads for dual-wielded Derringers, increasing sustained DPS.

traits.name: Assailant
traits.description: Increases melee effectiveness of Throwing Knives and Throwing Axes (25% more damage). Melee weapons found in the World can be thrown.

weapon_synergies.reason: Allows throwing the bat as a melee weapon, adding ranged utility.
Enables throwing the saber, turning it into a versatile ranged melee option.
Allows throwing the axe, providing a powerful ranged melee attack.
Assailant allows the Katana to be thrown, turning it into a ranged melee attack.
Assailant allows the Machete to be thrown, turning it into a ranged melee attack.
Assailant allows the Railroad Hammer to be thrown, turning it into a ranged melee attack.
Assailant allows the Slate's melee to be thrown, turning it into a ranged melee attack.

tool_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee damage of thrown knives, making the Knife's throw more lethal.
Assailant boosts melee effectiveness of Throwing Knives, improving their damage when used in close combat.
Assailant does not affect Heavy Knife; it only benefits throwing knives/axes and world melee weapons.
Assailant increases melee damage of Throwing Axes, making them more effective when used as melee weapons.
Assailant does not affect Dusters; it only benefits throwing knives/axes and world melee weapons.
Assailant does not affect Knuckle Knife; it only benefits throwing knives/axes and world melee weapons.

traits.name: Beastface
traits.description: Reduced reaction range of animals (50% less detection range; doesn't affect Monsters like Hellhounds).

traits.name: Berserker
traits.description: All melee attacks do double damage.

traits.name: Blade Seer
traits.description: Bolts, arrows, throwing axes, and throwing knives are highlighted in Dark Sight for better visibility. Also applies to Beetle view. (25m).

weapon_synergies.reason: Blade Seer highlights thrown Baseball Bats in Dark Sight, aiding retrieval.
Blade Seer highlights thrown Cavalry Sabers in Dark Sight, aiding retrieval.
Blade Seer highlights thrown Combat Axes in Dark Sight, aiding retrieval.
Blade Seer highlights thrown Katanas in Dark Sight, aiding retrieval.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee weapons in Dark Sight, but Machete is not thrown; no benefit.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee weapons, but Railroad Hammer is not thrown; no benefit.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee weapons, but Slate is a shotgun; no benefit.

tool_synergies.reason: Blade Seer highlights thrown knives in Dark Sight, helping you retrieve them after throwing.
Blade Seer highlights Throwing Knives in Dark Sight, making them easier to locate and recover.
Blade Seer does not affect Heavy Knife as it is not a thrown weapon.
Blade Seer highlights thrown axes in Dark Sight, making them easier to retrieve.
Blade Seer does not affect Dusters as they are not thrown weapons.
Blade Seer does not affect Knuckle Knife as it is not a thrown weapon.

traits.name: Bloodless
traits.description: Bleeding will not escalate from light to medium or intense bleeding.

traits.name: Bolt Thrower
traits.description: Reduced reload time for Crossbows (25% faster).

weapon_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces crossbow reload time, but Bow is not a crossbow; no benefit.
Bolt Thrower reduces crossbow reload time, directly benefiting Crossbow's slower reload.

traits.name: Bulletgrubber
traits.description: Recover the unfired round when performing partial reloads.

traits.name: Bulwark
traits.description: Reduce the damage from explosions and Bomb Lance harpoon attacks by 50%. Vastly reduces the duration of being fully blinded by a Flash Bomb (by 75%).

traits.name: Conduit
traits.description: Get a Health and Stamina boost (restores 50 HP and 100 Stamina) when your team picks up a Clue or closes a Rift.

traits.name: Dauntless
traits.description: Thrown Explosives can be defused when interacting with them (hold interact for 2 seconds).

traits.name: Deadeye Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a short scope (Deadeye variants).

traits.name: Death Cheat
traits.description: You will not lose your Hunter if you fail to extract, but equipment and missing Health Chunks will be lost.

traits.name: Decoy Supply
traits.description: Restock all types of Decoys from ammo crates (restores 2 of each type).

traits.name: Determination
traits.description: Stamina recovery starts 1 second sooner.

traits.name: Doctor
traits.description: Doubles the amount of Health restored by First Aid Kits.

tool_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles health restored by First Aid Kits, maximising healing efficiency.
Doctor doubles health restored by healing items, including the Medical Pack.
Doctor doubles health from healing consumables, boosting Vitality Shot value.
Doctor doubles health from healing consumables, boosting Vitality Shot value.

traits.name: Fanning
traits.description: Faster rate of fire when using 1-handed single-action pistols.

weapon_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action pistols, but Bornheim is semi-auto; no benefit.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action pistols, but New Army is double-action; no benefit.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action pistols, directly benefiting Conversion Pistol's slow fire rate.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers like the Pax, allowing faster follow-up shots.
Fanning does not benefit the Dolch 96 because it is semi-automatic, not single-action.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers like the LeMat, enabling rapid shots.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers like the Nagant M1895, improving DPS.
Fanning does not benefit the Officer because it is double-action, not single-action.
Fanning does not benefit the Quad Derringer because it is not a single-action pistol.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers like the Scottfield, enabling rapid shots.

traits.name: Frontiersman
traits.description: Carried Tools can be used one extra time.

traits.name: Gator Legs
traits.description: Walk and sprint faster in deep water. Also make less noise while crouched in water.

traits.name: Ghoul
traits.description: Killing Monsters restores a small amount of Health (5 HP per kill).

traits.name: Greyhound
traits.description: Sprint at full speed for a longer duration (increases stamina by 25%).

traits.name: Hornskin
traits.description: Reduce damage taken from blunt melee by 25%. Useful when fighting Armoreds and group of regular Grunts.

traits.name: Hundred Hands
traits.description: Increases the damage of a Bow and reduces sway while at full draw. Allows use of arrows in melee attacks.

weapon_synergies.reason: Hundred Hands increases bow damage and reduces sway at full draw, improving accuracy and lethality.
Hundred Hands increases bow damage and reduces sway, making crossbow shots more accurate and lethal at full draw.

traits.name: Iron Eye
traits.description: Remain in iron sights between shots when firing bolt-action, lever-action, and pump-action weapons.

weapon_synergies.reason: Iron Eye keeps you in iron sights after each shot, allowing faster follow-up shots with the bolt-action Berthier.
Iron Eye maintains sight picture between pump-action shots, improving accuracy and speed with the Marathon.
Iron Eye keeps you aimed after each shot, enabling quicker follow-up shots with the pump-action Rival 78.
Iron Eye is not applicable; the Auto-5 is semi-auto, not bolt/lever/pump-action.
Iron Eye keeps you in sights after firing the Drilling's shotgun barrels, aiding rapid follow-up.
Iron Eye keeps you aimed after each bolt-action shot, speeding up follow-up shots with the Lebel.
Iron Eye is not applicable; the LeMat is a revolver, not bolt/lever/pump-action.
Keeps you scoped after each lever-action shot, maintaining accuracy for follow-up long ammo hits.
Stays in ironsights after bolt cycling, allowing faster follow-up shots without re-aiming.
Romero is single-shot; Iron Eye is irrelevant as it doesn't cycle automatically.
Pump-action shotgun; Iron Eye keeps sights up between pumps for quicker follow-up shots.
Bolt-action; Iron Eye prevents scope exit after each shot, enabling rapid successive shots.
Bolt-action medium ammo; Iron Eye maintains sight picture for faster follow-up shots.
Lever-action shotgun; Iron Eye keeps you aimed between lever cycles for quicker shots.
Lever-action shotgun; Iron Eye retains sight alignment after each lever pull for rapid fire.
Staying in iron sights between lever-action shots maintains accuracy and target tracking for follow-up shots.
Staying in iron sights between lever-action shots maintains accuracy and target tracking for follow-up shots.
Staying in iron sights between lever-action shots maintains accuracy and target tracking for follow-up shots.

traits.name: Kiteskin
traits.description: Significantly reduces fall damage (by 50%).

traits.name: Levering
traits.description: Faster rate of fire from the hip when using lever-action weapons.

weapon_synergies.reason: Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action, allowing faster follow-up shots at close range.
Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action shotguns, enabling quicker follow-up shots in close combat.
Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action shotguns, enabling quicker follow-up shots in close combat.
Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action rifles, allowing faster spam fire at close range.
Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action rifles, allowing faster spam fire at close range.
Levering increases hip-fire rate for lever-action weapons, making the Centennial more effective in close quarters.

traits.name: Lightfoot
traits.description: Vault, fall, and climb ladders silently. Also reduces the sound of walking through noise traps.

traits.name: Magpie
traits.description: Receive three short effects when picking up a Bounty Token: Antidote (10 min), Stamina (10 min), and Regeneration (10 min). SOLO: Dark Sight Boost capacity in all Boost sources are doubled.

traits.name: Martialist
traits.description: Allows a Katana to be sheathed, which enables a first strike attack that does extra damage (2x damage).

traits.name: Mithridatist
traits.description: Drastically reduces the time needed to recover from poisoning. (Recovery time reduced by 80%)

traits.name: Necromancer
traits.description: Using Dark Sight, revive a downed partner from a distance. (25m) SOLO: You can revive your downed Hunter. Triggers a Full Health Restoration upon revive.

traits.name: Packmule
traits.description: Receive an additional Tool or Consumable when looting players or opening item boxes. (Guarantees 2 items instead of 1)

traits.name: Peacekeeper
traits.description: Dead (red-skulled) teammates can be revived at the cost of burning some of your Health Chunks. Looting a dead Hunter will restore one Health Chunk.

traits.name: Physician
traits.description: Reduce the time needed to bandage. (Bandage time reduced by 50%)

tool_synergies.reason: Physician reduces First Aid Kit use time by 50%, allowing faster healing under pressure.
Physician cuts Medical Pack use time by 50%, critical when reviving or healing mid-fight.
Physician reduces healing consumable use time, including Vitality Shots.
Physician reduces healing consumable use time, including Vitality Shots.
Physician reduces use time for Stamina Shots, enabling quicker stamina recovery.
Physician reduces use time for Stamina Shots, enabling quicker stamina recovery.
Physician reduces Regeneration Shot use time, making health-over-time faster to apply.
Physician reduces Regeneration Shot use time, making health-over-time faster to apply.

traits.name: Pitcher
traits.description: Increased throwing range for all items using the aim helper. (Throwing range increased by 50%)

weapon_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing the Bomb Lance's explosive harpoon to hit targets from farther away.

tool_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Dynamite Stick to be thrown farther.
Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Waxed Dynamite Stick to be thrown farther.
Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Sticky Bomb to be thrown farther.
Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Dynamite Bundle to be thrown farther.
Pitcher increases throw range, allowing safer frag bomb tosses from distance.
Pitcher extends throw range, enabling distant placement of big dynamite bundle.
Pitcher increases throw range, letting you ignite targets from safer distance.
Pitcher extends throw range, allowing area denial from farther away.
Pitcher increases throw range, enabling safe deployment of hellfire bomb.
Pitcher does not affect knife; knife is melee, not thrown.
Pitcher increases throw range, allowing silent kills from farther distance.
Pitcher does not affect heavy knife; it is melee, not thrown.
Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Throwing Axes to hit distant targets more effectively.
Pitcher increases throwing range, enabling Decoys to be thrown farther to distract enemies.
Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Alert Trip Mines to be placed at greater distances.
Pitcher increases throwing range, letting Chaos Bombs be thrown farther to create confusion.
Pitcher increases throwing range, enabling Blank Fire Decoys to be thrown farther to mimic gunshots.
Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Decoy Fuses to be thrown farther to simulate explosives.
Pitcher increases throwing range, but Dusters are melee; no benefit.
Pitcher increases throwing range, but Knuckle Knife is melee; no benefit.
Pitcher increases throw range, allowing safer deployment of Poison Bomb from distance.
Pitcher increases throw range, enabling self-buff from safer distance.
Pitcher increases throw range, enabling self-buff from safer distance.
Pitcher increases throw range, allowing safer deployment of Hive Bomb from distance.
Pitcher increases throw range, enabling trap placement from safer distance.
Pitcher increases throw range, allowing beetle launch from safer distance.
Pitcher increases throw range, allowing beetle launch from safer distance.
Pitcher increases throw range, allowing beetle launch from safer distance.

traits.name: Poacher
traits.description: Place and disarm traps quietly. (No sound made when placing or disarming traps)

traits.name: Poison Sense
traits.description: You can see nearby poisoned Hunters while in Dark Sight. Also applies to Beetle view. (150m)

traits.name: Quartermaster
traits.description: Can equip a medium slot Weapon in addition to a large slot Weapon.

traits.name: Rampage
traits.description: Killing an enemy Hunter while at least one Health Chunk is empty triggers a Restoration for your Hunter.

traits.name: Relentless
traits.description: Your Hunter won't lose a Health Chunk when downed.

traits.name: Remedy
traits.description: Using Dark Sight, interact with a Trait Spur within range to trigger a Restoration effect similar to banishing for your team's Hunters. (25m)

traits.name: Resilience
traits.description: Your Hunter is revived with up to full Health. (Revives with 100 HP regardless of missing chunks)

traits.name: Salveskin
traits.description: While alive, reduce all fire damage and stop burn speed and stop time from escalating. (Fire damage reduced by 25%, burn speed reduced by 50%)

traits.name: Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a scope.

traits.name: Serpent
traits.description: Using Dark Sight, interact with nearby Clues, Rifts, Banishable Targets, and abandoned Bounty from a safe distance. (25m) SOLO: Interaction range increased. (50m)

traits.name: Shadow
traits.description: Monsters can't see you, but they can still hear you.

traits.name: Silent Killer
traits.description: Reduces the sound you make when performing melee attacks.

traits.name: Sniper Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a long scope (Sniper variants).

traits.name: Steady Aim
traits.description: Weapon sway gradually lessens and stops when you're looking through a scope or aperture sights.

traits.name: Steady Hand
traits.description: Weapon sway gradually lessens when you're looking through the scope of a pistol or a stock-less weapon (applies to 2-slot weapons with a scope).

weapon_synergies.reason: Steady Hand reduces sway when aiming down sights on pistols, improving accuracy for the Bornheim's rapid follow-up shots.
Steady Hand reduces sway when aiming down sights on pistols, helping the Conversion Pistol land precise shots.
Steady Hand reduces sway when aiming down sights on pistols, enhancing the Dolch's accuracy during rapid fire.
Steady Hand reduces sway when aiming down sights on pistols, making the Derringer's small shots more reliable.

traits.name: Vigilant
traits.description: Nearby traps and active Beetles are highlighted in Dark Sight. Also applies to Beetle view. (25m)

traits.name: Vigor
traits.description: While in Dark Sight, doubles the rate at which Health and Stamina regenerate.

traits.name: Vulture
traits.description: Looting a Hunter will always reward you money.

traits.name: Whispersmith
traits.description: Reduces noise when selecting equipment.

traits.name: Witness
traits.description: While in Dark Sight, dead Hunters and Monsters are visible and health restoration is marginally increased when close. Also highlighted in Beetle view. (75m)

weapons.name: Baseball Bat
weapons.description: The Baseball Bat swings intuitively and easily, delivering a solid blow.

trait_synergies.reason: Allows throwing the bat as a melee weapon, adding ranged utility.
Blade Seer highlights thrown Baseball Bats in Dark Sight, aiding retrieval.

weapons.name: Berthier Mle 1892
weapons.description: The lighter alternative to the Lebel 1886, the Berthier Mle 1892 is a bolt-action mousqueton that doesn't lose power for the sake of its convenience.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye keeps you in iron sights after each shot, allowing faster follow-up shots with the bolt-action Berthier.

weapons.name: Bomb Lance
weapons.description: Adapted for combat on land, this explosive harpoon can be fired short distances and deals tremendous damage on direct impact.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing the Bomb Lance's explosive harpoon to hit targets from farther away.

weapons.name: Bornheim No. 3
weapons.description: This early German semi-automatic pistol can release a hail of accurate fire by virtue of its low recoil. Reloads via a five-round magazine, or by topping up rounds individually.

trait_synergies.reason: Speeds up custom clip reloads for semi-auto pistols, reducing downtime in firefights.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action pistols, but Bornheim is semi-auto; no benefit.
Steady Hand reduces sway when aiming down sights on pistols, improving accuracy for the Bornheim's rapid follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Bow
weapons.description: Able to pierce through flesh and bone at a great distance, the Hunting Bow will make quick, stealthy work of monsters and men.

trait_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces crossbow reload time, but Bow is not a crossbow; no benefit.
Hundred Hands increases bow damage and reduces sway at full draw, improving accuracy and lethality.

weapons.name: Caldwell 92 New Army
weapons.description: Fast, light, and easy to handle, this double-action revolver has a distinguished counter-clockwise rotating cylinder that swings out to effortlessly reload its six .38 bullets.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action pistols, but New Army is double-action; no benefit.

weapons.name: Caldwell Conversion Pistol
weapons.description: The Caldwell Conversion Pistol is a single-action six-shot revolver. Slow to reload but sturdy and reliable.

trait_synergies.reason: Faster matched pair reloads for revolvers, allowing quicker follow-up shots.
Fanning increases fire rate for single-action pistols, directly benefiting Conversion Pistol's slow fire rate.
Steady Hand reduces sway when aiming down sights on pistols, helping the Conversion Pistol land precise shots.

weapons.name: Caldwell Marathon
weapons.description: Fast-firing pump-action rifle that performs best at mid-range. A clunky reload reduces its flexibility.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye maintains sight picture between pump-action shots, improving accuracy and speed with the Marathon.

weapons.name: Caldwell Pax
weapons.description: This iconic single-action six round revolver needs no further introduction. Robust, powerful, and accurate, it brought peace to the once lawless West.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers like the Pax, allowing faster follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Caldwell Rival 78
weapons.description: Sturdy, break-action, side-by-side shotgun with a medium-length barrel that can destroy all but the toughest targets at close range.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye keeps you aimed after each shot, enabling quicker follow-up shots with the pump-action Rival 78.

weapons.name: Cavalry Saber
weapons.description: Regulation cavalry saber in use since the Civil War. Lightweight with good reach.

trait_synergies.reason: Enables throwing the saber, turning it into a versatile ranged melee option.
Blade Seer highlights thrown Cavalry Sabers in Dark Sight, aiding retrieval.

weapons.name: Combat Axe
weapons.description: A heavy two-handed melee weapon that can split open the toughest of enemies with ease.

trait_synergies.reason: Allows throwing the axe, providing a powerful ranged melee attack.
Blade Seer highlights thrown Combat Axes in Dark Sight, aiding retrieval.

weapons.name: Hand Crossbow
weapons.description: Imaginative hand crossbow that fires compact bolts. Excels in situations when discretion is required above all. Bolts can be retrieved and re-used.

trait_synergies.reason: Bolt Thrower reduces crossbow reload time, directly benefiting Crossbow's slower reload.
Hundred Hands increases bow damage and reduces sway, making crossbow shots more accurate and lethal at full draw.

weapons.name: Crown & King Auto-5
weapons.description: Prototype long-barreled semi-automatic shotgun with internal four round magazine plus one in the chamber. High power and rate of fire, but strong recoil and short range.

trait_synergies.reason: Quicker reloads for semi-auto shotguns, keeping pressure on enemies.
Iron Eye is not applicable; the Auto-5 is semi-auto, not bolt/lever/pump-action.

weapons.name: Dolch 96
weapons.description: Powerful, German, prototype, semi-automatic pistol with an internal magazine loaded from the top. When fully emptied, it can be reloaded fast with a ten-round stripper clip.

trait_synergies.reason: Speeds up custom clip reloads for semi-auto pistols, crucial in close combat.
Fanning does not benefit the Dolch 96 because it is semi-automatic, not single-action.
Steady Hand reduces sway when aiming down sights on pistols, enhancing the Dolch's accuracy during rapid fire.

weapons.name: Drilling
weapons.description: Two medium rifle barrels combined with a shotgun underbarrel to create an all-round flexible and powerful weapon.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye keeps you in sights after firing the Drilling's shotgun barrels, aiding rapid follow-up.

weapons.name: Katana
weapons.description: A two-handed sword refined over hundreds of years to slice and pierce even the sturdiest armor, making human flesh effortless to rend. Special attack enabled with Martialist Trait .

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant allows the Katana to be thrown, turning it into a ranged melee attack.
Blade Seer highlights thrown Katanas in Dark Sight, aiding retrieval.

weapons.name: Lebel 1886
weapons.description: The Lebel 1886, groundbreaking for its time, is a bolt-action rifle with an internal 10-round magazine. Slightly outperformed by more modern designs, it remains a powerful weapon of choice.

trait_synergies.reason: Iron Eye keeps you aimed after each bolt-action shot, speeding up follow-up shots with the Lebel.

weapons.name: LeMat Mark II Revolver
weapons.description: Infamous icon of the Confederacy, this updated model takes nine cartridges in its cylinder. Its second barrel delivers a shotgun blast up close.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers like the LeMat, enabling rapid shots.
Iron Eye is not applicable; the LeMat is a revolver, not bolt/lever/pump-action.

weapons.name: Machete
weapons.description: Used both for cutting through undergrowth and limbs, a machete is a reliable weapon to forge a path.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant allows the Machete to be thrown, turning it into a ranged melee attack.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee weapons in Dark Sight, but Machete is not thrown; no benefit.

weapons.name: Mako 1895 Carbine
weapons.description: Long range, lever-action rifle that delivers a powerful punch with long ammo. From a new manufacturer in competition with Winfield.

trait_synergies.reason: Keeps you scoped after each lever-action shot, maintaining accuracy for follow-up long ammo hits.
Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action, allowing faster follow-up shots at close range.

weapons.name: Martini-Henry IC1
weapons.description: The workhorse rifle of the British Empire, the Martini-Henry IC1 is a single-shot breech-loading rifle that values simplicity and power.

weapons.name: Mosin-Nagant M1891
weapons.description: Modern Imperial Russian bolt-action service rifle with an internal magazine, firing powerful long cartridges. When fully emptied, can be reloaded fast with a five-round stripper clip.

trait_synergies.reason: Stays in ironsights after bolt cycling, allowing faster follow-up shots without re-aiming.

weapons.name: Nagant M1895
weapons.description: Modern, Imperial Russian, single-action revolver. Slow to reload. Sacrifices stopping power for an extra bullet in the drum and a higher rate of fire.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers like the Nagant M1895, improving DPS.

weapons.name: Nagant M1895 Officer
weapons.description: Modern, Imperial Russian, double-action revolver. Though it has a faster rate of fire, the stronger force required to pull the trigger has a negative impact on accuracy.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning does not benefit the Officer because it is double-action, not single-action.

weapons.name: Nitro Express Rifle
weapons.description: Powerful, side-by-side, big game hunting rifle that can bring down the largest targets at mid-range. Carries limited ammunition.

weapons.name: Quad Derringer
weapons.description: A small, light pistol that is easy to carry and conceal. Holds four shots. Twelve additional rounds carried.

trait_synergies.reason: Faster matched pair reloads for dual-wielded Derringers, increasing sustained DPS.
Fanning does not benefit the Quad Derringer because it is not a single-action pistol.
Steady Hand reduces sway when aiming down sights on pistols, making the Derringer's small shots more reliable.

weapons.name: Railroad Hammer
weapons.description: Large mallet designed to hammer railroad spikes into their tracks, repurposed to hammer heads into the dirt.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant allows the Railroad Hammer to be thrown, turning it into a ranged melee attack.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee weapons, but Railroad Hammer is not thrown; no benefit.

weapons.name: Romero 77
weapons.description: Classic break-action shotgun with a long barrel. Good range and power for a shotgun. Has to reload after every shot.

trait_synergies.reason: Romero is single-shot; Iron Eye is irrelevant as it doesn't cycle automatically.

weapons.name: Scottfield Model 3
weapons.description: A classic, single-action break open revolver, the Scottfield has seen both sides of the law. The break action allows for quicker ejecting of spent rounds, meaning a faster overall reload when empty.

trait_synergies.reason: Fanning increases fire rate for single-action revolvers like the Scottfield, enabling rapid shots.

weapons.name: Sparks LRR
weapons.description: Renowned, large-bore, single-shot rifle with good sights. Can put down a bison across a prairie.

weapons.name: Specter 1882
weapons.description: Revolutionary pump-action shotgun with long barrel, able to fire shells in rapid succession. Reloading the internal magazine takes time, due to its clunky, unrefined loading sequence.

trait_synergies.reason: Pump-action shotgun; Iron Eye keeps sights up between pumps for quicker follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866
weapons.description: A breech-loading rifle with a .50-70 caliber centerfire cartridge, the Springfield 1866 is best known for its quick rate of fire.

weapons.name: Springfield M1892 Krag
weapons.description: The Springfield M1892 Krag is a bolt-action rifle that holds five rounds in its internal magazine, and one in its chamber. Its magazine lid allows the wielder to top it up from the side, without opening the bolt, and ejecting the chambered round.

trait_synergies.reason: Bolt-action; Iron Eye prevents scope exit after each shot, enabling rapid successive shots.

weapons.name: Vetterli 71 Karabiner
weapons.description: Swiss military, bolt-action carbine with internal magazine. Powerful at medium distances. Reloading is inspired by the Winfield repeater rifle, making it easy to top up ammunition.

trait_synergies.reason: Bolt-action medium ammo; Iron Eye maintains sight picture for faster follow-up shots.

weapons.name: Winfield 1887 Terminus
weapons.description: Seminal lever-action repeating shotgun. Boasting a balance between power and rate-of-fire, this became an icon of the era. Chamber 5+2 shells.

trait_synergies.reason: Lever-action shotgun; Iron Eye keeps you aimed between lever cycles for quicker shots.
Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action shotguns, enabling quicker follow-up shots in close combat.

weapons.name: Winfield 1893 Slate
weapons.description: An exposed hammer shotgun that replaces lever-action with pump-action, this Winfield Model 93 holds several 12-gauge rounds to cause devastating damage to opponents.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant allows the Slate's melee to be thrown, turning it into a ranged melee attack.
Blade Seer highlights thrown melee weapons, but Slate is a shotgun; no benefit.
Lever-action shotgun; Iron Eye retains sight alignment after each lever pull for rapid fire.
Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action shotguns, enabling quicker follow-up shots in close combat.

weapons.name: Winfield M1873
weapons.description: Iconic repeating rifle with very large internal magazine, capable of firing compact bullets at rapid speed. Reload is very simple, making an ammo top-up a quick job.

trait_synergies.reason: Staying in iron sights between lever-action shots maintains accuracy and target tracking for follow-up shots.
Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action rifles, allowing faster spam fire at close range.

weapons.name: Winfield M1873C
weapons.description: Lightened repeating rifle with demi-size internal magazine, capable of firing compact bullets at rapid speed.

trait_synergies.reason: Staying in iron sights between lever-action shots maintains accuracy and target tracking for follow-up shots.
Increases hip-fire rate for lever-action rifles, allowing faster spam fire at close range.

weapons.name: Winfield M1876 Centennial
weapons.description: Powerful repeating rifle chambered for larger ammunition than previous models. The magazine holds 9 rounds.

trait_synergies.reason: Staying in iron sights between lever-action shots maintains accuracy and target tracking for follow-up shots.
Levering increases hip-fire rate for lever-action weapons, making the Centennial more effective in close quarters.

tools.name: Fusees
tools.description: Handheld railroad flares used for illuminating dark areas and for signalling. Can ignite flammable materials. Comes in a pack of three.

tools.name: Flare Pistol
tools.description: A small pistol for firing flares into the air, illuminating the area. Can ignite flammable materials.

tools.name: Dynamite Stick
tools.description: A dynamite stick that detonates with a massive blast after four seconds.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Dynamite Stick to be thrown farther.

tools.name: Waxed Dynamite Stick
tools.description: A dynamite stick with a modified powder fuse that enables detonation under water and in choke bomb clouds.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Waxed Dynamite Stick to be thrown farther.

tools.name: Sticky Bomb
tools.description: Dynamite charge in a sticky frame that can be attached to objects and enemies. Its eight-second fuse doubles the detonation time of a dynamite stick.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Sticky Bomb to be thrown farther.

tools.name: Dynamite Bundle
tools.description: A bundle of several dynamite sticks. Why only bring one?

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Dynamite Bundle to be thrown farther.

tools.name: Frag Bomb
tools.description: Frag bombs send lethal shrapnel over a large area, lacerating nearby enemies. unlike dynamite however, the blast is not strong enough to destroy doors or concertina wire.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, allowing safer frag bomb tosses from distance.

tools.name: Big Dynamite Bundle
tools.description: A bundle of many dynamite sticks. When something really needs to be blown up.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher extends throw range, enabling distant placement of big dynamite bundle.

tools.name: Fire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container that bursts on impact. Spreads burning liquid over a large area.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, letting you ignite targets from safer distance.

tools.name: Liquid Fire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container. Burns on the surface of water. Internal steel balls cause it to burst on impact.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher extends throw range, allowing area denial from farther away.

tools.name: Hellfire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container that bursts on impact and creates a massive fireball.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, enabling safe deployment of hellfire bomb.

tools.name: Knife
tools.description: An all-purpose tool and melee weapon that has saved many lives - and taken just as many.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee damage of thrown knives, making the Knife's throw more lethal.
Blade Seer highlights thrown knives in Dark Sight, helping you retrieve them after throwing.
Pitcher does not affect knife; knife is melee, not thrown.

tools.name: Throwing Knives
tools.description: Silent, but short-ranged projectile weapon. Thrown knives can be retrieved and re-used.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant boosts melee effectiveness of Throwing Knives, improving their damage when used in close combat.
Blade Seer highlights Throwing Knives in Dark Sight, making them easier to locate and recover.
Pitcher increases throw range, allowing silent kills from farther distance.

tools.name: Heavy Knife
tools.description: The heavy knife is honed for close quarters combat, its iconic silhouette carves out its home in the American pantheon of armaments.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant does not affect Heavy Knife; it only benefits throwing knives/axes and world melee weapons.
Blade Seer does not affect Heavy Knife as it is not a thrown weapon.
Pitcher does not affect heavy knife; it is melee, not thrown.

tools.name: Throwing Axes
tools.description: Silent and deadly short-ranged projectile weapon. Can be retrieved and reused.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant increases melee damage of Throwing Axes, making them more effective when used as melee weapons.
Blade Seer highlights thrown axes in Dark Sight, making them easier to retrieve.
Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Throwing Axes to hit distant targets more effectively.

tools.name: Decoys
tools.description: A bag of scrap metal and glass. When thrown the noise can be effectively used to distract or divert enemies.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, enabling Decoys to be thrown farther to distract enemies.

tools.name: Alert Trip Mine
tools.description: This portable tripwire mine releases firecrackers and a small flare, alerting others to its location. Comes in a pack of four.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Alert Trip Mines to be placed at greater distances.

tools.name: Chaos Bomb
tools.description: Set of firecrackers that can be used to temporarily distract nearby enemies. Duration of about 30 seconds.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, letting Chaos Bombs be thrown farther to create confusion.

tools.name: Blank Fire Decoys
tools.description: A decoy that imitates the sound of a gunshot on impact. Useful to distract and confuse enemies.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, enabling Blank Fire Decoys to be thrown farther to mimic gunshots.

tools.name: Decoy Fuses
tools.description: Pack of decoy fuses that can be used to breach closed doors and window shutters. It can also imitate the behavior of a lit bomb and can fool your enemies in clearing a space.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throwing range, allowing Decoy Fuses to be thrown farther to simulate explosives.

tools.name: First Aid Kit
tools.description: A bag of medical supplies that heal 50 health and stop bleeding. Can be used three times.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles health restored by First Aid Kits, maximising healing efficiency.
Physician reduces First Aid Kit use time by 50%, allowing faster healing under pressure.

tools.name: Medical Pack
tools.description: A portable medical kit that heals 100 health. Deployable in active health emergencies.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles health restored by healing items, including the Medical Pack.
Physician cuts Medical Pack use time by 50%, critical when reviving or healing mid-fight.

tools.name: Dusters
tools.description: A row of metal rings worn on the hand in order to increase the damage caused in hand-to-hand combat.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant does not affect Dusters; it only benefits throwing knives/axes and world melee weapons.
Blade Seer does not affect Dusters as they are not thrown weapons.
Pitcher increases throwing range, but Dusters are melee; no benefit.

tools.name: Knuckle Knife
tools.description: The savage knuckle knife is a roughshod specialization for close quarters combat, suited for both bludgeoning and brutal thrusting deathblows.

trait_synergies.reason: Assailant does not affect Knuckle Knife; it only benefits throwing knives/axes and world melee weapons.
Blade Seer does not affect Knuckle Knife as it is not a thrown weapon.
Pitcher increases throwing range, but Knuckle Knife is melee; no benefit.

tools.name: Vitality Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores 75 health.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles health from healing consumables, boosting Vitality Shot value.
Physician reduces healing consumable use time, including Vitality Shots.

tools.name: Vitality Shot
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all health.

trait_synergies.reason: Doctor doubles health from healing consumables, boosting Vitality Shot value.
Physician reduces healing consumable use time, including Vitality Shots.

tools.name: Stamina Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all stamina and stops further depletion for 5 minutes.

trait_synergies.reason: Physician reduces use time for Stamina Shots, enabling quicker stamina recovery.

tools.name: Stamina Shot
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all stamina and stops further depletion for 10 minutes.

trait_synergies.reason: Physician reduces use time for Stamina Shots, enabling quicker stamina recovery.

tools.name: Regeneration Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot that continually restores health over a short duration.

trait_synergies.reason: Physician reduces Regeneration Shot use time, making health-over-time faster to apply.

tools.name: Regeneration Shot
tools.description: A shot that continuously restores health until fully healed.

trait_synergies.reason: Physician reduces Regeneration Shot use time, making health-over-time faster to apply.

tools.name: Poison Bomb
tools.description: On detonation emits a persistant, deadly cloud. Anything caught in or that passes through the cloud will be poisoned.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, allowing safer deployment of Poison Bomb from distance.

tools.name: Antidote Shot (Weak)
tools.description: Instantly cures and prevents all poison effects. Physical damage associated with poison attacks still applies.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, enabling self-buff from safer distance.

tools.name: Antidote Shot
tools.description: Instantly cures and prevents all poison effects. Physical damage associated with poison attacks still applies.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, enabling self-buff from safer distance.

tools.name: Hive Bomb
tools.description: Poisonous wasps emerge from this bomb to terrorize anyone unfortunate enough to be in the area. However it has no effect on monsters.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, allowing safer deployment of Hive Bomb from distance.

tools.name: Poison Trip Mine
tools.description: This portable tripwire mine releases a cloud of poison when triggered, disorienting enemies. Comes in a pack of two.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, enabling trap placement from safer distance.

tools.name: Ammo Box
tools.description: This small portable Ammo Box partially refills your weapons' extra ammunition, including special ammunition types.

tools.name: Tool Box
tools.description: A portable toolkit that refills some dwindling supplies in a tight spot.

tools.name: Stalker Beetle
tools.description: Stalker Beetles are bred to hunt and track prey, giving hunters a view from above. As a last resort, they can sacrifice themselves to cause a small explosion hampering anything caught in the radius.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, allowing beetle launch from safer distance.

tools.name: Choke Beetle
tools.description: Choke Beetles are bred to hunt and track prey, giving Hunters a view from above. They have evolved to explode into a cloud of suffocating gas, which they themselves are immune to.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, allowing beetle launch from safer distance.

tools.name: Fire Beetle
tools.description: Fire Beetles are bred to find and track pey, giving hunters a view from above. Upon death or command, they will burst into flames that burn everything they touch.

trait_synergies.reason: Pitcher increases throw range, allowing beetle launch from safer distance.
